explanation.disease_text_preview: Disease: Methionine malabsorption syndrome Phenotypes: Autosomal recessive inheritance; Blue irides; Intellectual disability; Seizure; Diarrhea; Tachypnea; Aminoaciduria; Positive ferric chloride test; White hair
